summary:
The companion diagnostic HercepTest has been formally recognized by the FDA because it enables accurate detection of HER2 expression necessary for using approved therapies like trastuzumab since their initial market authorization in 1998. Its use directly aligns with established guidelines supporting targeted treatments in HER2-positive cancer types, confirming regulatory acceptance through long-standing clinical implementation.
